# Strap Tool Reference

Schema version: 3.6.0

## Navigation

### listSpaces

**read** | workspace (auth 不要)
→ [{ spaceId, name, description, accessType, updatedAt }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 500) |  | Maximum number of spaces to return (default: 100) |
| offset | integer (min: 0) |  | Number of spaces to skip (default: 0) |

### listBoards

**read** | space (`auth: { spaceId }`)
→ [{ boardId, name, updatedAt, isRuleBoardForAgent }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 500) |  | Maximum number of boards to return (default: 100) |
| offset | integer (min: 0) |  | Number of boards to skip (default: 0) |

### getRecentlyUpdatedBoards

**read** | workspace (auth 不要)
→ [{ boardId, name, updatedAt, isRuleBoardForAgent }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 100) |  | Maximum number of boards to return (default: 10) |

### getRecentlyViewedBoards

**read** | workspace (auth 不要)
→ [{ boardId, name, updatedAt, isRuleBoardForAgent, viewedAt }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 100) |  | Maximum number of boards to return (default: 10) |

### searchBoardsByName

**read** | space (`auth: { spaceId }`)
→ [{ boardId, name, updatedAt, isRuleBoardForAgent }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| text | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 500) | ✓ | Board name search text (partial match) |
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 500) |  | Maximum number of boards to return (default: 100) |
| offset | integer (min: 0) |  | Number of boards to skip (default: 0) |

## Boards

### createBoard

**write** | space (`auth: { spaceId }`)
→ { boardId, name, defaultPageId }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 100) |  | Board name (default: "無題のボード" / Untitled Board) |

## Pages

### readPages

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ pageId, name, isDefault }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageIds | string (minLen: 1)[] |  | Page IDs to retrieve (returns all pages if omitted) |
| searchQuery | string |  | Search query to filter pages by name or content |

> **Note:** When both pageIds and searchQuery are provided, pageIds takes precedence

### createBoardPage

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { pageId, pageName }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 100) | ✓ | Board page name |
| description | string (maxLen: 10000) |  | Page description |

### createNotePage

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { pageId, pageName, noteId }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| title | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 100) | ✓ | Note page title |
| description | string (maxLen: 10000) |  | Page description |

### updateBoardPage

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { pageId }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| name | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 100) |  | New page name |
| description | string (maxLen: 10000) |  | New page description |

> **Note:** At least one of name or description must be provided

### updateNotePage

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { pageId }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| name | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 100) |  | New page name |
| description | string (maxLen: 10000) |  | New page description |

> **Note:** At least one of name or description must be provided

## Shapes

### createShape

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, textTruncation, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| shapeType | `rectangle` \| `circle` \| `triangle` \| `rhombus` \| `pill` | ✓ | Shape type to create |
| x | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | X position in pixels |
| y | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | Y position in pixels |
| width | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Width in pixels |
| height | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Height in pixels |
| text | string (maxLen: 20000) |  | Text content |
| bold | boolean |  | Bold text |
| fontSize | integer (min: 1, max: 2000) |  | Font size |
| textColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Text color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Fill color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| fillGradientEndColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Gradient end color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| strokeColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Stroke (border) color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| lineWidth | integer (min: 1, max: 32) |  | Border line width in pixels (1–32). No border if omitted. Presets: thin=2, light=3, normal=4, thick=8, extraThick=16 |
| cornerRadius | integer (min: 0, max: 100) |  | Corner radius (0–100). 0 = sharp corners. Only applies to rectangle, triangle, rhombus |
| alignment | `left` \| `center` \| `right` |  | Horizontal text alignment (default: center) |
| verticalAlignment | `top` \| `middle` \| `bottom` |  | Vertical text alignment (default: middle) |

> **Note:** displayTruncation is returned when text overflows the visible area. Use suggestedHeight to resize the element. Padding: 32px horizontal, 16px vertical. lineHeight = fontSize × 1.618. Triangle uses only 75% of height for text

### updateShapeColor

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Fill color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| textColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Text color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| strokeColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Stroke (border) color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| fillGradientEndColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Gradient end color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |

> **Note:** At least one color parameter must be provided

### updateShapeLineWidth

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| lineWidth | integer (min: 1, max: 32) | ✓ | Border line width in pixels (1–32). Presets: thin=2, light=3, normal=4, thick=8, extraThick=16 |

> **Note:** Requires strokeColor to be set on the shape. If strokeColor is not set, returns VALIDATION_ERROR. Use updateShapeColor to set strokeColor first.
> **Note:** Setting lineWidth also sets boxStyle to outline (border visible)

### updateShapeCornerRadius

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| cornerRadius | integer (min: 0, max: 100) | ✓ | Corner radius (0–100). 0 = sharp corners. Only applies to rectangle, triangle, rhombus |

> **Note:** Only applies to rectangle, triangle, rhombus. Circle and pill ignore cornerRadius

## Text

### createText

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, textTruncation, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| text | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 20000) | ✓ | Text content |
| x | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | X position in pixels |
| y | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | Y position in pixels |
| width | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Width in pixels |
| height | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Height in pixels |
| bold | boolean |  | Bold text |
| fontSize | integer (min: 1, max: 2000) |  | Font size |
| textColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Text color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| alignment | `left` \| `center` \| `right` |  | Horizontal text alignment (default: left) |
| verticalAlignment | `top` \| `middle` \| `bottom` |  | Vertical text alignment (default: top) |

> **Note:** Text elements do not visually truncate with "…". displayTruncation is not returned for text elements

### updateElementText

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, textTruncation, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| text | string (maxLen: 20000) | ✓ | New text content |

> **Note:** displayTruncation is returned for shapes and sticky notes when text overflows the visible area

## Sticky Notes

### createStickyNote

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, textTruncation, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| text | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 20000) | ✓ | Sticky note text content |
| x | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | X position in pixels |
| y | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | Y position in pixels |
| bold | boolean |  | Bold text |
| fontSize | integer (min: 1, max: 2000) |  | Font size |
| textColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Text color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Fill color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| alignment | `left` \| `center` \| `right` |  | Horizontal text alignment (default: center) |
| verticalAlignment | `top` \| `middle` \| `bottom` |  | Vertical text alignment (default: middle) |

> **Note:** Sticky note size is fixed (200×200). width/height parameters are not accepted
> **Note:** displayTruncation is returned when text overflows the visible area. Use suggestedHeight to resize the element

### updateStickyNoteColor

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Fill color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| textColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Text color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |

> **Note:** At least one color parameter must be provided

## Connectors

### createConnector

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, textTruncation, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| fromElementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Source element ID |
| toElementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| text | string (maxLen: 1000) |  | Connector label text |
| bold | boolean |  | Bold text |
| fontSize | integer (min: 1, max: 2000) |  | Font size |
| strokeColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Stroke color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| hasStartArrowhead | boolean |  | Show arrowhead at the start |
| hasEndArrowhead | boolean |  | Show arrowhead at the end |
| lineWidth | integer (min: 1, max: 32) |  | Line width in pixels (1–32). Presets: thin=2, light=3, normal=4, thick=8, extraThick=16 |

> **Note:** hasStartArrowhead defaults to false
> **Note:** hasEndArrowhead defaults to false

### updateConnectorColor

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| strokeColor | string (#RRGGBB) | ✓ | Stroke color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |

### updateConnectorWidth

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| lineWidth | integer (min: 1, max: 32) | ✓ | New line width in pixels (1–32). Presets: thin=2, light=3, normal=4, thick=8, extraThick=16 |

## Icons

### createIcon

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| iconDescription | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 500) | ✓ | Icon description or search query (e.g. "check", "warning") |
| x | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | X position in pixels |
| y | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | Y position in pixels |
| width | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Width in pixels |
| height | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Height in pixels |
| iconStyle | `outline` \| `glyph` \| `colored` |  | Icon style: outline (stroke color), glyph (fill color), colored (original colors) |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Fill color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA), used when iconStyle is glyph |
| strokeColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Stroke color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA), used when iconStyle is outline |

### updateIcon

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| iconDescription | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 500) | ✓ | New icon description or search query |

### updateIconStyle

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, styleFallback }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| iconStyle | `outline` \| `glyph` \| `colored` | ✓ | Icon style: outline (stroke color), glyph (fill color), colored (original colors) |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Fill color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |
| strokeColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Stroke color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |

## Images

### createImageFromUrl

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| imageUrl | string | ✓ | Image URL to place on the board (HTTPS only) |
| fillColor | string (#RRGGBB) |  | Opacity via RGBA hex (#RRGGBBAA). Only the alpha channel (AA) is used for image transparency |
| x | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | X position in pixels |
| y | integer (min: -100000, max: 100000) | ✓ | Y position in pixels |
| width | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Width in pixels |
| height | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | Height in pixels |

> **Note:** imageUrl must be an HTTPS URL (HTTP is rejected server-side via .refine())

## Elements (Read)

### getElements

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [[{ elementId, type, width, height, x, y, zIndex, text, textColor, fontSize, fillColor, fillGradientEndColor, strokeColor, from, to, alignment, verticalAlignment }]]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 500) |  | Maximum number of elements to return (default: 200) |
| offset | integer (min: 0) |  | Number of elements to skip (default: 0) |

> **Note:** Response is a 2D array grouped by element type: [[shapeElements...], [textElements...], ...]

### getElementsByIds

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ elementId, type, width, height, x, y, zIndex, text, textColor, fontSize, fillColor, fillGradientEndColor, strokeColor, from, to, alignment, verticalAlignment }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| elementIds | string (minLen: 1)[] (min: 1, max: 100) | ✓ | Element IDs to retrieve |

### getElementsByTypes

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ elementId, type, width, height, x, y, zIndex, text, textColor, fontSize, fillColor, fillGradientEndColor, strokeColor, from, to, alignment, verticalAlignment }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| types | `shape` \| `text` \| `stickyNote` \| `icon` \| `ruledLine` \| `connector` \| `image`[] (min: 1, max: 7) | ✓ | Element types to filter by |

### getElementIndexes

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ elementId, zIndex }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |

### searchElementsByText

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ elementId, type, width, height, x, y, zIndex, text, textColor, fontSize, fillColor, fillGradientEndColor, strokeColor, from, to, alignment, verticalAlignment }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| text | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 500) | ✓ | Search text (case-insensitive) |
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 500) |  | Maximum number of elements to return (default: 200) |
| offset | integer (min: 0) |  | Number of elements to skip (default: 0) |

### searchElementsByUpdatedDatetime

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ elementId, type, width, height, x, y, zIndex, text, textColor, fontSize, fillColor, fillGradientEndColor, strokeColor, from, to, alignment, verticalAlignment }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| startDatetime | string |  | Start of datetime range (ISO 8601) |
| endDatetime | string |  | End of datetime range (ISO 8601) |
| limit | integer (min: 1, max: 500) |  | Maximum number of elements to return (default: 200) |
| offset | integer (min: 0) |  | Number of elements to skip (default: 0) |

> **Note:** At least one of startDatetime or endDatetime must be provided

## Elements (Transform)

### updateElementIndex

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)

### updateElementSize

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| width | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | New width in pixels |
| height | integer (min: 1, max: 50000) | ✓ | New height in pixels |

> **Note:** displayTruncation is returned for shapes and sticky notes when text overflows the visible area after size change

### updateFontSize

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| fontSize | integer (min: 1, max: 2000) | ✓ | New font size |

> **Note:** displayTruncation is returned for shapes and sticky notes when text overflows the visible area after font size change

### updateBold

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| bold | boolean | ✓ | Set to true for bold, false to remove bold |

### updateTextColor

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| textColor | string (#RRGGBB) | ✓ | Text color in hex (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) |

### updateTextAlignment

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { element, displayTruncation }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| elementId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target element ID |
| alignment | `left` \| `center` \| `right` |  | Horizontal text alignment (left/center/right) |
| verticalAlignment | `top` \| `middle` \| `bottom` |  | Vertical text alignment (top/middle/bottom) |

> **Note:** At least one of alignment or verticalAlignment must be provided

## Notes & Paragraphs

### getNoteParagraphs

**read** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ [{ paragraphId, type, order, markdown }]

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID |
| paragraphIds | string (minLen: 1)[] |  | Paragraph IDs to retrieve (returns all if omitted) |

### createTextParagraphs

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { paragraphs }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| noteId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target note ID |
| content | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 10000) | ✓ | Paragraph text content (Markdown supported) |
| order | integer |  | Display order (appended to end if omitted) |

### createPageLinkParagraph

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { paragraphs }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| noteId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target note ID |
| pageId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target page ID to link to |
| order | integer |  | Display order (appended to end if omitted) |

### createImageParagraph

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { paragraphs }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| noteId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target note ID |
| imageUrl | string | ✓ | Image URL (must be directly accessible via HTTPS) |
| order | integer |  | Display order (appended to end if omitted) |

> **Note:** imageUrl must be an HTTPS URL (HTTP is rejected via schema .refine())

### updateTextParagraph

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { paragraphs }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| noteId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target note ID |
| paragraphId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target paragraph ID |
| content | string (minLen: 1, maxLen: 10000) | ✓ | New paragraph content (Markdown or plain text) |

### deleteParagraph

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { deletedParagraphId }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| noteId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target note ID |
| paragraphId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target paragraph ID |

### deleteTextParagraph

**write** | board (`auth: { boardId }`)
→ { deletedParagraphId }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| noteId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target note ID |
| paragraphId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | Target paragraph ID |

## Agent Rule Sets

### listAgentRuleSets

**read** | space (`auth: { spaceId }`)
→ [{ agentRuleSetId, name }]

パラメータなし

### getAgentRuleSet

**read** | space (`auth: { spaceId }`)
→ { agentRuleSetId, name, ruleSet }

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| agentRuleSetId | string (minLen: 1) | ✓ | ID of the agent rule set to retrieve |
